name: Maria Bamford
bio: Maria Bamford is an American stand-up comedian and actress known for her surreal, voice-driven act and candid material about mental illness, anxiety, depression, and her family. She was the first female comic to record two Comedy Central Presents half-hour specials. She created and starred in the semi-autobiographical Netflix series Lady Dynamite.

timeline.ev: Releases her first album and tour, The Burning Bridges Tour
The Maria Bamford Show web series debuts
Records The Special Special Special! in her parents living room
Releases the Netflix special Old Baby

accolades: First female comic with two Comedy Central Presents half-hour specials
Described by Judd Apatow as the funniest woman in the world
Author of the 2023 memoir Sure, Ill Join Your Cult

bits.t: Had Motel One Night Stands for 15 Years
